name: 51 · Scene Twin (live planning-scene twin on the xArm 6)
description: Drives the live move_group PLANNING SCENE twin on the SIMULATED xArm 6 — and renders the REAL scene, not a re-computed one. A single LeaseScope holds one `xarm_fleet` runner (requirement `ros.robot_model == xarm6`) for the whole run; everything inside rides that held lease by containment, so every step hits the SAME persistent move_group scene. In sequence: (1) `reset_scene` clears all world + attached collision objects (`/clear_scene`, idempotent head); (2) `add_sample_a` + (3) `add_sample_b` push two box CollisionObjects into the scene at table-level reachable poses (`/add_object`); (4) `plan_reach` plans to a gripper-down grasp pose above sample_a (`/plan_to_pose`) and (5) `exec_reach` executes it (FollowJointTrajectory, Path B, NO twin stream); (6) `grasp` atomically closes + attaches sample_a (`/grasp`); (7) `plan_lift` plans a raised/home lift and (8) `exec_lift` executes it AND declares a Data/Out channel `scene` — as the lift trajectory runs the ROS backend streams move_group's ACTUAL planning scene (arm joint states + the two world boxes + sample_a now riding the gripper) as NDJSON frames (content_type `application/vnd.aithericon.planning-scene+x-ndjson;model=xarm6`, `scene_stream_ms: 200`). The UI render registry routes that stream to the planning-scene twin renderer, drawing the LIVE scene on the `exec_lift` → `twin_view` edge — the twin reflects the real move_group world + attached objects + true joint states, NOT an interpolated re-computation. (9) `twin_view` is the data-plane consumer that drains the channel (`for chunk in stream('scene')`), counts complete frames, and feeds End (`frames = {{ twin_view.received_frames }}`); (10) `release` detaches sample_a back into the world. The bulk scene stream rides the out-of-band JetStream datastream transport — it NEVER enters the net marking (open + close only). DRAFT: sample/grasp/lift poses are starting guesses to tune live. LIVE ONLY: requires `just dev xarm-up` to build the xArm 6 + rosbridge container and enroll an `xarm_fleet` runner advertising `ros.robot_model == xarm6`.
